languages.text: "Стоит помнить, что люди — такой же ресурс, как и все остальное для Империума. Естественно, Нунциус, мог бы быть более сдержанным в своих формулировках".
"One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."
languages.original_text: "Стоит помнить, что люди — такой же ресурс, как и все остальное для Империума. Естественно, Нунциус, мог бы быть более сдержанным в своих формулировках".

traits.locale_text: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."
"One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."
"One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."

languages.text: «No hay que olvidar que la gente es un recurso como cualquier otro para el Imperium. Aunque también es cierto que Nuncius podría haber sido más comedido al expresar su opinión».
languages.original_text: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."

traits.locale_text: «No hay que olvidar que la gente es un recurso como cualquier otro para el Imperium. Aunque también es cierto que Nuncius podría haber sido más comedido al expresar su opinión».

languages.text: “我们必须时刻牢记，在帝国之中，人本身也是一种资源，就跟其他物资一样。当然，努恩修斯刚才的措辞完全可以更委婉一些。”
languages.original_text: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."

traits.locale_text: “我们必须时刻牢记，在帝国之中，人本身也是一种资源，就跟其他物资一样。当然，努恩修斯刚才的措辞完全可以更委婉一些。”

languages.text: « Il ne faut jamais oublier que le peuple est une ressource comme les autres dans l'Imperium. Bien sûr, Nuncius aurait pu s'exprimer avec plus de réserve. »
languages.original_text: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."

traits.locale_text: « Il ne faut jamais oublier que le peuple est une ressource comme les autres dans l'Imperium. Bien sûr, Nuncius aurait pu s'exprimer avec plus de réserve. »

languages.text: "İmparatorluk'ta insanların da diğer her şey gibi birer kaynak olduğu asla unutulmamalıdır. Elbette Nuncius, kelime seçiminde daha ölçülü olabilirdi."
languages.original_text: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk'ta insanların da diğer her şey gibi birer kaynak olduğu asla unutulmamalıdır. Elbette Nuncius, kelime seçiminde daha ölçülü olabilirdi."

languages.text: 「帝国においては、人々もまた他の何物にも劣らぬ資源であることを、決して忘れてはなりません。もっとも、ヌンキウスはもう少し言葉を選んでもよかったでしょうが」
languages.original_text: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."

traits.locale_text: 「帝国においては、人々もまた他の何物にも劣らぬ資源であることを、決して忘れてはなりません。もっとも、ヌンキウスはもう少し言葉を選んでもよかったでしょうが」

languages.text: "Man darf nie vergessen, dass Menschen innerhalb des Imperiums eine Ressource wie jede andere sind. Natürlich hätte Nuncius etwas vorsichtiger in der Wahl seiner Worte sein können."
languages.original_text: "One must never forget that people are as much a resource as anything else in the Imperium. Of course, Nuncius could have been more restrained in his choice of words."

traits.locale_text: "Man darf nie vergessen, dass Menschen innerhalb des Imperiums eine Ressource wie jede andere sind. Natürlich hätte Nuncius etwas vorsichtiger in der Wahl seiner Worte sein können."
